use_codes.desc: METHOD OF TREATING AN ARGATROBAN TREATABLE CONDITION

indications.text:
1.1 Heparin Induced Thrombocytopenia
Argatroban Injection is indicated for prophylaxis or treatment of thrombosis in adult patients with heparin-induced
thrombocytopenia (HIT).
